error_signature: Refresh Token not being stored or issued
title: Zoho WorkDrive Refresh Token Issue
symptom: The connection to Zoho WorkDrive expires after 60 minutes due to issues with the refresh token not being stored or issued correctly.
applies_when: Using Zoho WorkDrive with Generic OAuth2
root_cause: The Generic OAuth2 credential in n8n may not properly handle the refresh token, either failing to store it or not receiving it from Zoho due to misconfiguration or missing parameters.
fix_steps: Create the app in api-console.zoho.eu as a 'Server-based Application'.
Manually generate the initial authorization code via the browser.
Use Insomnia or Postman to exchange the authorization code for a permanent refresh token.
Store the refresh token in an n8n variable node.
Use an HTTP Request Node to call 'https://accounts.zoho.eu/oauth/v2/token' with 'grant_type=refresh_token' at the start of your workflow.
agent_instruction: Implement a manual flow using the HTTP Request Node to handle the refresh token process.
